name: desktop
description: Desktop harness for Pi coding agents
author: OpenHarness

scripts.prebuild: pnpm --filter @openharness/pi-rpc build && pnpm --filter @openharness/shared build && pnpm --filter @openharness/workflow-executor build
scripts.dist: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.dist:dir: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/main/workflow-pi.test.ts src/main/workflow-review-lines.test.ts src/main/workflow-run-result.test.ts src/main/workflow-run-summarize.test.ts src/main/thread-tools.test.ts src/shared/slash-tool-availability.test.ts src/shared/slash-menu-catalog.test.ts src/main/github-actions-session.test.ts src/main/workflow-notify-mappings.test.ts src/main/office-tools.test.ts src/main/office-files.test.ts src/main/workbook-files.test.ts src/main/file-search.test.ts src/main/org-secrets.test.ts src/shared/path-grants.test.ts src/shared/thread-tools.test.ts src/shared/workflow-slash-tools.test.ts src/shared/oauth-model-refs.test.ts src/main/git-remote.test.ts src/main/token-usage-daily.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/conversation-runtime.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/swarm-progress.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/composer-drop.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/attached-roots-sync.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/lexical-draft.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/token-usage-stats.test.ts src/main/markdown-edit-lock.test.ts
